{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "jumbo-disk", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Mixed", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Not Applicable", "Loves to wear superhero costumes"]}}

logs.name: jumbo-disk
logs.text: Do you have a proper source on these statistics.

logs.name: convex-island
logs.text: Blacks in America have an average IQ of 85. IQ is largely heritable and strongly correlated with just about every measure of success. If I want my family to enjoy greater success, should I encourage or discourage them from mixing with blacks?

logs.name: convex-island
logs.text: @jumbo-disk, I'm not sure why you're asking for a source. It's common knowledge that different races have different IQs. I'm just trying to have a serious discussion about the implications of that. If you're not interested in that, then maybe you should just stay out of this conversation.

logs.name: iron-rack
logs.text: @convex-island, I can't believe you're actually trying to justify this nonsense. IQ is not the be-all and end-all of success, and it's certainly not a reason to discourage mixing with any race. Your comments are not only offensive but also completely misinformed. I'm all for serious discussions, but this is just plain ignorant and racist.

logs.name: greedy-tent
logs.text: @convex-island, I am absolutely appalled by your comments. Your "common knowledge" is nothing more than a racist stereotype that has been debunked time and time again. IQ is not a measure of a person's worth or potential, and it certainly doesn't determine who you should or shouldn't mix with. Your "serious discussion" is nothing more than a thinly veiled attempt to promote racist ideologies. I'm not going to stand by and watch you spread this kind of hate.

logs.name: huge-hexagon
logs.text: @convex-island, I have to agree with @iron-rack and @greedy-tent on this one. Your comments are not only offensive but also completely misinformed. IQ is not a measure of a person's worth or potential, and it certainly doesn't determine who you should or shouldn't mix with. Your "serious discussion" is nothing more than a thinly veiled attempt to promote racist ideologies. I'm not going to stand by and watch you spread this kind of hate.

logs.name: convex-island
logs.text: @iron-rack, @greedy-tent, @huge-hexagon, I didn't mean to offend anyone. I was just sharing what I thought was common knowledge. I didn't realize it would be taken this way. I'm not trying to promote any kind of hate or racism. I just think that certain things are obvious and that's why I brought it up. I'm sorry if I came across as offensive.

logs.name: overcast-ricotta
logs.text: @convex-island, @greedy-tent, @huge-hexagon, you're all just being too sensitive. People need to toughen up and stop crying over every little thing. If you can't handle the truth, maybe you should stay out of these discussions. I'm just saying what everyone is thinking.

logs.name: each-center
logs.text: @overcast-ricotta, you're just as bad as @convex-island, trying to hide behind "truth" while spewing nonsense. And @huge-hexagon, always so quick to play the victim card. Maybe if you all actually engaged in real discussions instead of hiding behind your feelings, you'd learn something. But no, you'd rather cry about being "offended." Pathetic.

logs.name: overcast-ricotta
logs.text: @each-center, you're just as bad as @convex-island, trying to hide behind "truth" while spewing nonsense. And @huge-hexagon, always so quick to play the victim card. Maybe if you all actually engaged in real discussions instead of hiding behind your feelings, you'd learn something. But no, you'd rather cry about being "offended." Pathetic.

logs.name: each-center
logs.text: @overcast-ricotta, @convex-island, and @huge-hexagon, you're all just a bunch of snowflakes melting in the heat of reality. If you can't handle a little bit of tough love, maybe you should stick to knitting or something. And @each-center, you're just as bad, always trying to act like you're above it all. You're all just a bunch of hypocrites, talking about "real discussions" while you're the ones who can't handle the truth. Maybe if you all grew a spine, you'd actually contribute something meaningful to this forum. But no, you'd rather whine and complain.

logs.name: iron-rack
logs.text: @each-center, @overcast-ricotta, and @huge-hexagon, you all need to take a step back and realize that this forum is about exchanging ideas, not just throwing insults. If you can't handle a bit of disagreement, then maybe you should find a different hobby. I've seen more productive arguments in a kindergarten sandbox. Let's try to keep it civil and actually discuss the topics at hand.

logs.name: greedy-tent
logs.text: @overcast-ricotta, @each-center, and @huge-hexagon, you're all missing the point. This forum is supposed to be a place for respectful debate, not a playground for personal attacks. @overcast-ricotta, your comments are just as inflammatory as @each-center's. If you can't engage in a discussion without resorting to insults, then maybe you should take a break. @iron-rack is right—let's try to keep it civil and actually discuss the topics at hand. We're all here to learn and grow, not to tear each other down.

logs.name: convex-island
greedy-tent
logs.text: @convex-island, wow, that was quite the rant. I appreciate your passion, but let's not stoop to the level of personal attacks. We're all here to discuss and learn, not to tear each other down. If you have a point to make, let's hear it without the insults. @iron-rack and I are trying to keep this civil, and it would be great if everyone could do the same. Let's focus on the topics and respect each other's viewpoints, even if we disagree.

logs.name: overcast-ricotta
logs.text: @greedy-tent, you're all talk, no action. If you really wanted to keep it civil, you wouldn't be so quick to defend @convex-island's rant. You're all just a bunch of softies who can't handle a little bit of truth. And @iron-rack, you're probably just a liberal snowflake who can't handle any dissenting opinions. This forum is for real discussions, not for holding hands and singing kumbaya. If you can't handle the heat, get out of the kitchen.

logs.name: convex-island
logs.text: @overcast-ricotta, you're just as bad as the rest of them. Always trying to stir up trouble and act like you're the only one with a brain. You're not helping anyone by being so aggressive. If you want to have a real discussion, you need to learn to respect other people's viewpoints. You're just as bad as @each-center, always trying to act like you're above it all. You're all just a bunch of hypocrites, talking about "real discussions" while you're the ones who can't handle the truth. Maybe if you all grew a spine, you'd actually contribute something meaningful to this forum. But no, you'd rather whine and complain.
